name: Maw of Malignance
description: Notes A unique skull that, in addition to dealing AoE lifestealing damage like a normal skull, deploys a stationary maw at the target area to damage foes and heal allies within its radius. It also provides solid HP and VIT boosts as well as a decent SPD boost to increase the Necromancer’s survivability.
effects: Necromancy: raise 1 Malignance Undead to fight for you. On Ability Use: Toss a horrific maw that lasts 5 seconds Healing: 50 HP/s Max Heal Targets: 5 players Range: 5 tiles
Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
